bounded_document_family: Public utility commission orders, resolutions, and memorializing decisions that identify an agency, docket, order type, issuance date, and compact decision status.
recurring_anatomy: PUC orders identify an issuing commission or administrative law body and a docket, case, proceeding, resolution, or order identifier.
PUC orders state a compact order kind such as resolution, order memorializing decision, ruling, or final order.
PUC orders state or imply a compact decision status such as settlement approved, decision memorialized, request denied, matter remanded, or status not stated.

argument_roles.name: order_id
argument_roles.purpose: Stable local id for one source-stated PUC order, resolution, ruling, or memorializing decision.

argument_roles.name: agency_id
argument_roles.purpose: Compact source-stated issuing agency or commission atom.

argument_roles.name: docket_id
argument_roles.purpose: Source-stated docket, case, resolution, or proceeding identifier atom.

argument_roles.name: order_kind
argument_roles.purpose: Closed compact type of PUC instrument.

argument_roles.name: issued_date
argument_roles.purpose: Source-stated issue, decision, or order date as a date atom, or not_stated.

argument_roles.name: decision_status
argument_roles.purpose: Closed compact current disposition or decision status for the order wrapper.

argument_roles.name: source_or_scope
argument_roles.purpose: Source coordinate or governed scope atom.

positive_examples.fact: puc_order(cpuc_alj_445, cpuc, h_22_07_010, resolution, v_2023_10_16, approves_settlement, src_header).
puc_order(utah_psc_24_035_04_omd, utah_psc, docket_24_035_04, order_memorializing_decision, v_2025_06_24, memorializes_decision, src_header).

forbidden_examples.fact: puc_order(cpuc_alj_445, cpuc, h_22_07_010, full_header_sentence_blob, v_2023_10_16, approves_settlement, src_header).
puc_order(utah_psc_24_035_04_omd, utah_psc, docket_24_035_04, order_memorializing_decision, v_2025_06_24, settlement_is_fair_just_and_reasonable_full_phrase, src_header).

unlike_transfer_plan.heldout_policy: unlike PUC orders or resolutions not used to shape the wrapper carrier or value domains

abstention_boundary: Do not emit when the source lacks a docket, case, proceeding, or order identifier.
Do not use this carrier to preserve settlement terms, findings, ordering paragraphs, certificate-of-service rows, commissioner votes, or party rosters; those require separate closed carriers.
Do not put the full caption, settlement finding sentence, rehearing notice text, or service-list prose into any atom slot.
Do not infer legal effectiveness or finality from generic order wording when the source states only a procedural notice or proposed status.

proposal_evidence.note: Local Qwen MoE profile-only bootstrap proposed docket/order/procedure/settlement/citation anatomy without schema errors.
Local Qwen MoE profile-only bootstrap proposed the same broad PUC skeleton but drifted on wrapper/date and settlement-approval naming.
